002900     SELECT PRINT-FILE ASSIGN TO                                  ST1134.2

003900 FD  PRINT-FILE.                                                  ST1134.2
004000 01  PRINT-REC PICTURE X(120).                                    ST1134.2

006100 SORT-PARA SECTION.                                               ST1134.2
006200 SORT-PARAGRAPH.                                                  ST1134.2
